title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph with four specialized agents for flights, hotels, itineraries, and final responses. The system integrates Llama 3.3 70B via Groq, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs for real-time data.
